'''Firin Morett''' was a fair-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] with [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] who worked as an [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought by the Alliance against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CCG" /> Stationed with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] at the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref> prior to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY's]] [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> he<ref name="Yavin 4 Rebels" /> had final launch authority in the base's [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]]<ref name="CCG" /> and managed ground crews.<ref name="FF">{{FactFile|67|MIL 5-8|Escape of the ''Millennium Falcon''}}</ref>

Responsible for preparing [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red]] and [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] for battle,<ref name="CCG" /> Morett and his ground crews worked quickly to prepare the [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] before the Battle of Yavin.<ref name="FF" /> Right before the battle, Morett was adding [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] to one of the starfighters as the [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] were departing. The battle ended with the Alliance destroying the Imperial [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] above Yavin 4. Morett wore a gray [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuit]].<ref name="ANH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Firin Morett first appeared in [[1977]]'s [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], the first film of the [[original trilogy]].<ref name="ANH" /> His scene was filmed between [[May 13]] and [[May 18]], [[1976]] at [[Shepperton Studios]]'s stage H.<ref name="MakingOf">''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Definitive Story Behind the Original Film]]''</ref> He was first named by [[Decipher]] in [[1998]], for their ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
